sections.title: Install from source
sections.description:
openagentic is installed by cloning the repo and building it locally. The core
flow is the same on every platform:

```
clone  →  install deps  →  npm run build  →  link or bundle
```

Pick the section for your OS below for the exact prerequisites and
platform-specific gotchas. W

sections.title: Quick Start
sections.description:
### With Ollama (local models)
```bash
openagentic --ollama-host http://localhost:11434 --model gpt-oss:latest
```

### With OpenAgentic Platform
```bash
openagentic --api-endpoint https://your-platform.example.com/api/openagentic --api-key <your-key>
```

### Environment variables

sections.title: Features
sections.description:
- **Multi-provider**: Ollama, OpenAgentic, AWS Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, Azure Foundry
- **All models**: Works with any model your provider supports — gpt-oss, qwen3.5, deepseek, llama, mistral, devstral, Claude, GPT-4, Gemini
- **Full tool suite**: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glo

sections.title: Architecture
sections.description:
```
openagentic (CLI)
    ├── @agentic-work/llm-sdk    ← Our LLM SDK (Messages API client, SSE streaming)
    ├── Ollama direct             ← /v1/messages endpoint on Ollama
    ├── OpenAgentic API proxy     ← /api/openagentic/v1/messages → routes to any provider
    └── platform/

sections.title: Slash Commands
sections.description:
| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/help` | Show all commands |
| `/model` | Select model |
| `/doctor` | Health check |
| `/config` | Settings |
| `/compact` | Summarize and clear context |
| `/diff` | Show uncommitted changes |
| `/commit` | Stage and commi

sections.title: Development
sections.description:
```bash
# Build from source
npm install
npm run build    # tsc (emits JS despite type errors from internal-only modules)

# Bundle (single file + binary)
./scripts/bundle.sh

# Run from source
node dist/entrypoints/cli.js --ollama-host http://localhost:11434 --model gpt-oss:late

sections.title: SDK
sections.description:
OpenAgentic uses `@agentic-work/llm-sdk` — our own Messages API client SDK. Zero external telemetry. Configurable base URL. Drop-in compatible with any Messages API endpoint.

```bash
# The SDK is at ../openagentic-sdk/
cd ../openagentic-sdk && npm run build
```

sections.title: Testing
sections.description:
openagentic uses [vitest](https://vitest.dev/) for its parity test harness, located in `testing/`. The harness is the safety net for the ongoing rework — see `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-06-openagentic-rework-design.md` for the full story.

### Running tests

```bash
npm test
